channel.title: Consumer-Advocacy on Joseph Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in Consumer-Advocacy on Joseph Carlson

item.title: Piracy isn't Theft
item.description: If buying isn’t owning, piracy isn’t theft.

item.title: Advertising of the Future
item.description:
As technology evolves, platforms do as well. We’ve gone through word-of-mouth, newspaper segments, static website promotions and personalized advertisements tailored to your personal search history. Just when you thoughts tailored advertisements couldn’t get any worse, as they are being inserted into every free second of unallocated thought, you would be wrong.

There have been a few recent instances of excessive and intrusive advertisement practices that have pushed me back to good old paperback books in recent months.

item.title: Beyond Right to Repair
item.description:
Shoutout to FUTO and CATF. I’ve been a long time subscriber of

Slowly but surely, rights are being taken away. When you open your eyes, there’s no denying that fact.

Now surely, there are many aspects of today’s world where people are more free than in prior decades.

Unfortunately, this website is about technology. In the world of tech, we are not free. Not free to repair. Not free to own. We didn’t arrive here overnight, but rather over decades of increased regulation blocking new entrants and anticompetitive business practices by the leadership of Big Tech organizations, all while the FTC hid away in the closet with a blindfold on (for the most part).

item.title: Hidden Giants
item.description:
Largest companies you never heard of and why they matter.

Everyone knows about the big three… BlackRock, Vanguard, and State Street.

The same with the giants in the cloud and broader sector of technology infrastructure.

The Danish Ministry of Digital Affairs has announced the transition away from the Windows operating system.

Equinix - Data Centers

ASML - EUV Lithography

SoftBank Group - ARM Intellectual Property

Subtle Consolidation

Avoiding Antitrust - Meta and Scale AI
